# GitHub Issue Template

Use this when converting starter work items into GitHub Issues.

## Title

[Area]: [Specific artifact]

## Labels

`area:*`, `status:draft`, `needs:evidence` or `needs:approval` where relevant.

## Goal

State the smallest useful public result.

## Sources

- Add official URLs, repository docs, or evidence notes.

## Expected Output

- document, page, issue, pull request, digest, course note, or draft.

## Approval Gate

- [ ] No outreach sent.
- [ ] Claims are source-backed.
- [ ] Sensitive-domain disclaimer checked.
- [ ] Maintainer review path is clear.

## Platform Links

- GitLab work item:
- Jira issue:
- Bitbucket pull request or commit:
